programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 3
programme.desc: Shannon and Arena put themselves forward as the two weakest performers from the Red Team.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 6
programme.desc: Two lucky chefs fly to Malaysia for a private class with Rick Stein.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Qantas Fine Dining Challenge
programme.desc: Contestants pair up and are asked to prepare one of eight courses of Neil Perry's QANTAS First Class menu.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 4
programme.desc: Craig, Michael, Shannon and Rachel face a Heston Blumenthal creation: burger with chips and a milkshake.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 6
programme.desc: Kate competes against Darren Purchese, Melbourne's answer to Adriano Zumbo.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Team Challenge 5
programme.desc: In the sustainable food challenge, contestants prepare a lunch service at the Greenhouse "pop up" restaurant.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 5
programme.desc: The losing team face a three-round elimination challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 7
programme.desc: The judges reveal the secret to cooking the perfect spotted dick.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Mystery Box Challenge 3
programme.desc: This week's Korean-inspired Invention Box challenge is set by Korean-American top chef David Chang.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Pressure Test 5
programme.desc: Danielle, Michael, Adam and Ellie face a Pressure Test set by George's mother Mary Calombaris.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 7
programme.desc: Hayden takes on pastry chef Vincent Gadan in the immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Westfield Team Challenge
programme.desc: Teams are asked to prepare simple dishes that have specific dietary requirements.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 7
programme.desc: The Red Team face an "In-the-round" challenge with two stages.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 8
programme.desc: Mary Calombaris, George's mother, shares the secret to preparing the perfect moussaka.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Moran Farm Challenge
programme.desc: The Top 12 contestants are tasked with preparing lunch for 200 hungry farmers and their families.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Pressure Test 6
programme.desc: Ellie, Danielle and Peter are set a tough test by chef Matthew Kemp.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 8
programme.desc: The fierce battle for the immunity pin sees Christine Manfield as a guest judge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Two Briefs Team Challenge
programme.desc: Teams are faced with their first catering jobs.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Blind Taste Test
programme.desc: The Blue Team are faced with two challenges: a Taste Test and an Invention Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 9
programme.desc: As a reward, contestants Ellie and Alana are given another culinary lesson by the best chefs in New Zealand.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Mystery Box Challenge 4
programme.desc: In a Sunday Challenge, the contestants are faced with a Mystery Box and an Invention Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Pressure Test 7
programme.desc: Mat, Billy and Hayden face off in a Pressure Test

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 9
programme.desc: Chef Alessandro Pavoni challenges Dani to make a tray of sibas, squid soup, and tomato powder for immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Marco Pierre White Challenge
programme.desc: Billy returns to the house after Mat's removal.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 8
programme.desc: Michael, Hayden, Kate and Peter face a three-round elimination challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 10
programme.desc: Luke Nguyen conducts a special master class about Vietnamese cuisine.

programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Flying High
programme.desc: Poker player Shireen Mui goes all in against The Banker.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Small Town, Big Dreams
programme.desc: Loveable Bryce Gage has big dreams for his small town, Marble Falls, TX.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - My Big Fat Greek Game Show
programme.desc: George Stathoulis and his big Greek family take over the show in a plate-breaking and suspense filled game.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Father Knows Best
programme.desc: The Motor City, Detroit, brings one-of-a-kind father of five sons, John West, to the stage.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Head Over Heels
programme.desc: Philadelphia’s Missy Silverman shakes up the stage with her boundless energy.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Sony's Choice
programme.desc: One of Deal or No Deal’s biggest fans, Sony Avalos is clear she knows how to play the game better than anyone.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Cowboy Up
programme.desc: Real life Las Vegas hero, Justin Uhart storms the stage ready to risk it all for his chance at $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Cheering For A Lucky Strike
programme.desc: Cheerleader Tex Iniguez shakes her pom poms past six figures in hopes of beating The Banker.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Million Dollar Lane
programme.desc: Double the deals, double the drama - bowling champion Kyera presses on in her battle against The Banker.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Mile-High Millionaire
programme.desc: Flight attendant, Max Reynolds is used to high-flying adventures.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP39
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP32
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP4
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP5
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Bingo To A Million
programme.desc: Playing for his Golden Girls-style dream home, former Bingo caller Tony Oriente.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Million Dollar Musical
programme.desc: Business owner, La’Sherrie Butler Hogan showstops the stage, and the game.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Million Dollar Ironman
programme.desc: Miami police officer and Ironman competitor Jorge Montero seeks to secure his children's future.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - The Champ Vs. The Banker
programme.desc: Michael Chandler is used to taking some hits and putting up a good fight – and tonight is no different.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Hoop Dreams
programme.desc: Single mother and marathoner Monica Durazo comes from a sales background and a family of competitors.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Wall Street Warrior
programme.desc: Lisa Glicksman knows exactly what kind of fight is needed to beat The Banker.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Magic Touch
programme.desc: In another incredible combo game of Deal or No Deal, two new contestants fill the studio with magical moments.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Roller Coaster In Motion
programme.desc: Deal or No Deal comes to life with two Orlando contestants taking over.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP9
programme.desc: Nine $1 million cases are on the line for a New Jersey woman's game.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP5
programme.desc: A pharmacy technician competes.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP7
programme.desc: Seven $1 million cases are in the mix for a male nurse from Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP20
programme.desc: A farmer-grandmother from Iowa returns to finish her game. In addition, a Missouri musician tries to hit all the right notes in his bid for the $1 million prize.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP12
programme.desc: The game gets hairy for a barber from Ohio, who plays for $2 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP15
programme.desc: A woman from Florida continues her quest to score the big prize. Then a Minnesota math teacher hopes it will all add up for a million-dollar win.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP18
programme.desc: A coach from Tennessee tries to score $1 million. Then, a makeup artist from Texas pursues the top prize.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - New York Boroughs Challenge
programme.desc: In their first challenge in New York, contestants are each sent to a different part of the city.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - United Nations Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants have three hours to prepare intricate dishes for 300 hundred guests at the United Nations.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 10
programme.desc: Renowned Italian chef Cesare Casella challenges Ellie to create his Pasta Amatriciana.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - New York Team Challenge
programme.desc: The teams have 3.5 hours to race from Times Square to the Four Seasons Restaurant to each cook one course..

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 9
programme.desc: Sun, Dani, Hayden and Billy are tasked with cooking traditional soul food.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 11
programme.desc: The chefs attend a master class at the Marriott Marquis on their last day in New York.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Dalai Lama Challenge
programme.desc: The Masterchef contestants must cook for the one and only Dalai Lama!

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Pressure Test 9
programme.desc: Billy and Kate have two hours to recreate Katrina Kanetani's 'Autumn' dessert plate.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 11
programme.desc: Famous MasterChef winner Eamon Sullivan challenges Dani to prepare his Chocolate Delice dessert.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Qantas First Lounge Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants take over 90 minutes of service at the QANTAS First Lounge kitchen at Sydney Airport.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 10
programme.desc: Hayden, Kate and Michael have 90 minutes to cook a dish demonstrating skills acquired during the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 12
programme.desc: The final five finalists are challenged to make mushroom turnip ravioli.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Mystery Box Challenge 5
programme.desc: In a Mystery Box Challenge, the top 5 pick each other's ingredients as per the Secret Santa method.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Cooking for Loved Ones Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants cook ten servings of a single dish of their choosing for the judges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 12
programme.desc: Guest chef Teage Ezard challenges Michael to a three course meal cook-off in the last immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Worst Nightmare Challenge
programme.desc: The top 5 are surprised by George in the early morning as he shows up at the house with three guest chefs.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 12
programme.desc: Dani chooses to use her immunity pin, sending Alana into the Elimination Challenge against Ellie.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 13
programme.desc: The chefs learn the art of setting up and plating dishes at their master class.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Sunday Challenge 12
programme.desc: The contestants develop a recipe for a single dish, which will then be styled and photographed.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - EP80
programme.desc: The top four are given 135 minutes to reproduce Maggie Beer's Chook Terrine with various accompaniments.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 13
programme.desc: Contestants are given three hours to cook three dishes that reflected the story of their life.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Three Hat Challenge
programme.desc: The top three are each sent to a different establishment where they will design a dish to fit on the menu.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Pressure Test 10
programme.desc: Kate and Alana are given 4.5 hours to reproduce Adriano Zumbo's "Fairytale House" dessert.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 14
programme.desc: Each finalist get a chance to learn with a private tutor for the last masterclass.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP22
programme.desc: 4 contestants, from Ohio, Connecticut and 2 from California - battle it out in a special speed game.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Thanksgiving Special - Part 1
programme.desc: A restaurateur competes in a tasty Thanksgiving-themed game worth $2 million. In addition, the case models participate in various eating contests.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP19
programme.desc: A female drag racer from California revs up to play for the $1 million prize, as does a vivacious farmer-grandmother from Iowa.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP17
programme.desc: Tis the season for a potential million-dollar Christmas. In holiday-themed games, a family from California steps up to play, as does a newly married war hero from Oregon.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP8
programme.desc: Eight $1 million cases are added to a Minnesota woman's game.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Thanksgiving Special - Part 2
programme.desc: A restaurateur competes in a tasty Thanksgiving-themed game worth $2 million. In addition, the case models participate in various eating contests.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP10
programme.desc: A hot-dog merchant from Nevada and a teacher from Pennsylvania compete for the top prize.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP39
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP32
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP6
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP7
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP21
programme.desc: A New Jersey workingman plays for big bucks.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP16
programme.desc: A Minnesota teacher tries to chalk up a win. Then a part-time bartender from Massachusetts plays, hoping to tap into some cash to open a bar.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP14
programme.desc: A single mother from the Bronx and a woman from Florida vie for the top prize.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP6
programme.desc: A newly married woman from Kansas City, Kan., plays a game with six $1 million cases.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP4
programme.desc: The Banker offers a Detroit video-game fan the chance to become a game character.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP3
programme.desc: NASCAR's Jimmie Johnson drops by to meet a player from Rhode Island.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP1
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP2

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP5
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP11
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (11 out of 39)

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP12
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (12 out of 39)

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP16
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (16 out of 39)

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP17
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (17 out of 39)
